channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Rejects Direct Talks with US as Pakistan Mediation Continues
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi laid out Iran's demands in Islamabad while ruling out face-to-face meetings with US negotiators. The US has dispatched envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner to Pakistan for indirect peace talks. - Reuters
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇦 Major Russian Attack Kills Seven in Ukraine as Dnipro Struck by Barrage
item.description: Russia launched over 660 drones and missiles in a massive overnight attack that killed at least seven people and wounded dozens in Dnipro and other Ukrainian regions. It marks one of the largest Russian barrages in recent weeks. - Reuters
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇱🇧 Four Killed in Israeli Strikes on Southern Lebanon Despite Ceasefire
item.description: Israeli strikes killed four people in southern Lebanon, state media reported, while the Israeli military said Hezbollah had fired rockets at Israel. The attacks come despite an extended ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon. - Reuters
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine and Russia Swap 193 Prisoners Each in UAE-Facilitated Exchange
item.description: Russia and Ukraine exchanged 193 prisoners of war each in a swap facilitated by the United States and UAE. The returned prisoners included soldiers, border guards, and police, some with injuries. - Reuters
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇫🇷 Macron Pushes to Reopen Strait of Hormuz as TotalEnergies Warns of Shortages
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron reaffirmed efforts to reopen the Strait of Hormuz amid the Iran conflict. TotalEnergies CEO warned of global energy shortages if the war continues for months. - Reuters
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇷🇺 Germany attributes global Signal and WhatsApp cyber campaign to Russia
item.description: Berlin believes the coordinated attack on encrypted messaging platforms presumably originated in Russia, according to Der Spiegel, highlighting ongoing hybrid warfare concerns. - Kyiv Independent
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky signs cooperation deals with Azerbaijan during first wartime visit
item.description: President Zelensky met with Azerbaijani President Aliyev in Baku, marking his first wartime visit to Azerbaijan and signing bilateral cooperation agreements. - Kyiv Independent
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🇺🇸 HH-60W Jolly Green II helicopters to take on doomsday evacuation role in Washington
item.description: The US Air Force will modify its new combat rescue helicopters for VIP airlift and continuity of government operations, replacing aging UH-1N Twin Hueys. - The War Zone
item.dc:creator: The War Zone

item.title: 🇺🇸 Navy rushing Hellfire missiles to carrier strike groups for counter-drone ops
item.description: The US Navy is pushing more hard-kill counter-drone capabilities to its fleet as it confronts growing threats from Iranian one-way attack drones in the Middle East. - The War Zone
item.dc:creator: The War Zone

item.title: 🇸🇪 Swedish intelligence warns Russian Orthodox church is espionage platform
item.description: A Russian Orthodox church near Vasteras airport with an unusually tall spire and elusive priest is suspected of being used by Moscow for espionage and hybrid activities threatening Sweden's security. - France 24
item.dc:creator: France 24

item.title: 🏛️ US Justice Department Drops Federal Reserve Investigation
item.description: The DOJ has ended its criminal investigation into Fed Chair Jerome Powell, clearing the path for Kevin Warsh's confirmation. A judge earlier quashed subpoenas citing "essentially zero evidence" of criminal conduct. - AP News
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Reaffirms Falklands Sovereignty After US Review Report
item.description: Downing Street insisted the Falkland Islands belong to the UK after reports the Pentagon was considering options to punish NATO allies. An internal email suggested reviewing the US position on Britain's claim to the territory. - BBC
item.dc:creator: BBC

item.title: 🇺🇦 Seven killed in major Russian attack on Ukraine as jets scrambled in Romania
item.description: Russia launched its largest attack in days with over 600 drones and missiles, killing at least seven people including five in Dnipro where an apartment building was hit. British Typhoons were scrambled from Romania as Russian drones approached NATO airspace. - BBC
item.dc:creator: BBC

item.title: 🇲🇱 Coordinated jihadist attacks hit multiple cities across Mali
item.description: Explosions and gunfire reported in Bamako, Gao, Kidal and Sevare in what analysts describe as the largest coordinated jihadist attack on Mali in years. Airport closed as military battles JNIM and Tuareg rebels. - BBC
item.dc:creator: BBC

item.title: 🇧🇷 Bolsonaro son launches presidential bid to free father from prison
item.description: Flavio Bolsonaro announces candidacy for Brazilian president with explicit goal of freeing his father Jair Bolsonaro, who is currently imprisoned. The move sets up a high-stakes election battle against Lula. - Washington Post
item.dc:creator: Washington Post

item.title: 🇪🇺 NATO pushes back at reported US threat to suspend Spain over Iran war support
item.description: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlined options to punish allies perceived as lacking support for the Iran war, including suspending Spain from NATO. European allies strongly rejected the notion. - BBC
item.dc:creator: BBC

item.title: 🇨🇳 US sanctions China-based oil refinery in sweeping crackdown on Iranian oil trade
item.description: Treasury targets China teapot refinery and 40 shipping entities for purchasing Iranian oil, expanding enforcement against Tehrans shadow trade network amid the ongoing conflict. - AP News
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Executes Alleged Israeli Agent Over Sabotage During Protests
item.description: Iran executed a man accused of acting as an Israeli agent and carrying out sabotage operations during nationwide protests. The execution highlights ongoing tensions between Iran and Israel. - Jerusalem Post
item.dc:creator: Jerusalem Post

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu Declared Cancer-Free After Hiding Diagnosis During Iran War
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu was declared cancer-free after concealing his diagnosis during the Iran conflict. The revelation raises questions about transparency during wartime. - Jerusalem Post
item.dc:creator: Jerusalem Post

item.title: 🇵🇰 Islamabad Residents Bear Cost of Pakistan US-Iran Mediation
item.description: As Pakistan hosts US-Iran talks, local residents face disruptions from a semi-lockdown in the capital. The mediation effort comes with significant costs to daily life and commerce in Islamabad. - Nikkei Asia
item.dc:creator: Nikkei Asia

item.title: ✈️ US Air Force Aims to Double F-15EX Eagle Fleet to 267 Aircraft
item.description: The US Air Force plans to boost F-15EX Eagle II inventory to 267 aircraft, doubling the original program size. The move reflects growing demand for advanced fighter capabilities amid global tensions. - Defense News
item.dc:creator: Defense News

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Greens Leader Slams Starmer Over 'Weaponizing' Antisemitism
item.description: UK Green Party co-leader Carla Denyer criticized Prime Minister Keir Starmer for what she called 'weaponizing' antisemitism after a parliamentary rebuke. The exchange highlights tensions over Middle East policy in British politics. - Haaretz
item.dc:creator: Haaretz

item.title: 🇵🇰 US Envoys Head to Pakistan for Iran Talks as Diplomatic Push Intensifies
item.description: Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel to Islamabad on Saturday for negotiations with Iranian officials, as both sides seek to de-escalate the ongoing conflict. Iran's foreign minister Abbas Araghchi is also in Pakistan for the discussions. - New York Times
item.dc:creator: New York Times

item.title: 🇪🇺 Europe Prepares for Prolonged Ukraine War With No Clear End Strategy
item.description: With US attention focused on Iran, neither Russia nor Ukraine has a path to victory or negotiation. European leaders are bracing for a protracted conflict as American diplomatic resources shift elsewhere. - New York Times
item.dc:creator: New York Times

item.title: 🇨🇳 US Sanctions Chinese Refinery for Buying Iranian Oil, Funding Military
item.description: The Treasury Department targeted Hengli refinery for generating hundreds of millions in revenue for Iran's military operations through illicit oil sales, stepping up enforcement of sanctions. - Al Jazeera
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
